title: Wixterus
description: The armor is Crafted like any other vanilla armor but with wixterus and it is more powerful than diamons and netherite and more rare too and it can be crafted just like vanilla tools.
body:
The Wixterus Mod Adds a new ore to the game named "wixterus" that can be found in caves like a normal ore or in a few of the mod's structures that are added in every update.

With the Wixterus you can craft an armor that is better than the nethirite armor and tools that are more efficient than the netherite and diamonds ones.

Also keep in mind that this mod is my first mod , so it can have some problems and i look forward to read your feedbacks.

And Thank you.
